summary: APPROVE 0 blockers 5 advisories; scope correctly bounded, Tier1+2+3 ported faithfully, DEFER-M10 set matches audit exactly; protected-hook edits do NOT break m6-suite (test-rollback.sh not in run_m6_suite and already divergent); legacy byte-pins are git-diff-vs-HEAD so resolve on commit; A1 redaction-parity drift + A2 --check removal trap are the two to fold before build.

advisories_digest.statement: C2 hardens only evidence-log.sh; sibling redaction copies adapters/codex/dmc_codex_common.py:179 + tests/fixtures/m6.5/_m65common.sh:207 become stale and the m6.5 C3 parity test compares those two stale copies (not the live hook) so it stays green despite drift; update all three in lockstep OR disclose divergence.
D4 removing --check breaks dmc mirror-check (bin/dmc:431 execs mirror --check); keep --check as annotated alias, do not remove.
C1 broadened verb set must anchor on a secret OPERAND not the verb; AC4 must add negative controls that benign uses (grep src, cp a b, sed workflow) still ALLOW; floor is Block-A all-modes incl off.
hooks-v0.6.5 fixture is a pinned PRE-M6 snapshot (test-rollback.sh, not in run_m6_suite), already divergent — leave untouched; no in-suite fixture pins live hook bytes so the conditional is a no-op.
B2 must reject only .. segments, never absolute paths (self-tests A3/A7/A8 use absolute scope_lock_ref); over-broad safe_repo_rel port would regress the 41 baseline.
